open_risks.description: WUL glyphs may become decorative ritual if not parsed into typed packets and tested against behavior change.
Kernel-adjacent packets must never mutate governed state directly; compile-time validator must fail closed.
Confidence, stance, urgency, and impact fields are self-reported and require calibration or HAL verification.

p1_scope.name: compile-time WUL packet validator
p1_scope.allowed_effect: validate symbolic packets before any action layer sees them
p1_scope.forbidden_effect: kernel mutation, canon mutation, ledger append, sovereign permission grant
p1_scope.success_condition: invalid packets fail closed in tests

kernel_safe_rules: WUL may describe kernel state but may not write kernel state.
WUL must compile to typed packet before any action.
HAL must validate typed packet before execution.
